g.text: Figure V2.14.3. The DES-Dovekie+CMB+DESI DR2 diagnostic target lies in the quintessence-today, more-phantom-into-past quadrant;
the registered five-channel shape menu remains near LCDM and cannot reach the DES central w0 above the -0.9 ceiling.
